---
name: 💡 Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Touchstone
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What's frustrating or missing today?
_Example: "When building a large golden set, I can't tell which questions still need review."_

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've thought about.

## Additional context

Mockups, links, export-format references, or examples from other tools that illustrate the idea.
